creator: dim@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Thierry Thomas from comment #86)
That's fine, don't worry!

Note that if setting CXXFLAGS works for a port, it will automatically also work with USE_CXXSTD, since USE_CXXSTD does nothing more than appending -std=XXX to CXXFLAGS.

However, I have encountered a bunch of ports that really don't respect CFLAGS or CXXFLAGS, so sometimes you have to find tricky ways to get your preferred flags in there... :)
